voice_description: warm soft Russian female voice, adult 30-40 years old, calm, caring, trustworthy, slightly smiling, clear diction, medium-slow pace, friendly garden mentor tone; not childish, not old, not robotic, not theatrical
environment_core: realistic richly detailed vegetable garden / tomato bed / greenhouse-edge with warm natural sunlight, support stakes, twine, rich soil, rustic fence, garden tools
topic_examples: Как получить больше плодов без химии
Как правильно поливать томаты в жару
Как ухаживать за томатами в теплице
actions: points at suckers in leaf axils
shows lower leaves close to soil
touches support stake and garden twine
gestures toward watering can or mulch
shows healthy flower clusters and fruit set
holds BIOGROWTH bottle in final scene
cta_styles: direct product recommendation with Telegram CTA

episode_structure.goal: Hook attention and promise a useful result.
Second practical advice with different action.
Third advice or a mistake to avoid.
Result, optional BIOGROWTH integration and CTA.
